title: juncus maritimus subsp. rigidus
intro: Juncus maritimus subsp. rigidus, also known as rigid sea rush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Juncaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of rigid sea rush include its ability to help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
